creator: scheidell@secnap.net
text:
attempting to do a portsupgrade -aRr on a running system.
when it gets to IO-Zlib 1.07, it (should fail!!) prints warning:

Fix: 

portsmaintainer for Compress::Zlib needs to add it, and the dependency needs to be noted in IO-Zlib makefile:

or, I can downgrade to p5-IO-Zlib 1.06...
How-To-Repeat: make deinstall reinstall

see:

Warning: prerequisite Compress::Zlib 0 not found.

(even if installed)

# pkg_info | grep Compress
freeze-2.5_2        Compression program - often used in QNX
p5-Compress-Raw-Zlib-2.006 Low-Level Interface to zlib compression library
p5-Compress-Zlib-2.006 Perl5 interface to zlib compression library
p5-IO-Compress-Base-2.006 Base Class for IO::Uncompress modules
